documentation.value: Creates an inline hyperlink. The title attribute is optional and shown as a tooltip on hover.
The visible link text.
The URL the link points to.
Optional tooltip text shown on hover.
Embeds an image. The alt text is displayed if the image cannot be loaded.
Alternative text describing the image.
The URL or path of the image.
Optional tooltip text shown on hover.
Creates a reference-style link. The reference_id is defined elsewhere as [reference_id]: url.
The visible link text.
The identifier linking to a URL defined elsewhere in the document.
Creates a fenced code block with optional syntax highlighting for the specified language.
Optional language identifier for syntax highlighting (e.g., javascript, python, bash).
Creates a heading. The number of # characters (1-6) determines the heading level.
One to six hash characters for heading levels 1-6.
Creates a table using pipes and hyphens. Columns are separated by | and the header row is separated from data by a line of dashes.
Column header text.
Table cell content.
Creates a blockquote. Nest with additional > characters.
The quoted text content.
Creates a task list item. Use [ ] for incomplete and [x] for completed tasks.
The task description text.
